blended.narrative: Whistler Blackcomb is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,031 ft. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

Thursday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
